creator: vovkasm@gmail.com
text:
Please, commit this!

2012/4/29 Edwin Groothuis <edwin@freebsd.org>:
> Maintainer of converters/p5-Storable-AMF,
>
> Please note that PR ports/167433 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
> =C2=A0 =C2=A0http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=3Dports/167433
>
> --
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org



--=20
Vladimir Timofeev <vovkasm@gmail.com>
